title: Connected Columns: Most Recent Item Display

posts.author: JDAY (Jared Yousif)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday_Connected_Boards1826×996 119 KB

Hello Monday.com Community,

I hope everyone is doing well!

I’d like the data in the mirror columns (Outlined in red) to display the most recent connected item, instead of a summary of all items. Does anyone know if this can be done? It seems the 'latest" will show for the date columns, but the status will still be a summary of everything.

Grateful for you help in advance, thank you all!

posts.author: Ag47Panda (Steve Wasson)
posts.cookedHtml: Good question. I don’t think the match tool has that level of control. Maybe try only linking one item at a time and have more entries? Hard to know without knowing your setup.
